chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. S – 66 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 15.05.2023 Mr. Ghulam Rasool Narejo, Advocate for the petitioner..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned counsel for the petitioner states that the petitioner is ready to pay the amount of dowry articles to respondent No.1 in installments and such application was filed by him in Family Execution bearing No.06 of 2022 before the Family Court, Pir-Jo-Goth; however, the same has not been decided by the Executing Court. Learned counsel further states that in case directions are issued to the Family/Executing Court concerned for deciding such application of the petitioner, he would be satisfied and would not press instant petition. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of by directing to the Executing Court concerned to decide the pending application of the petitioner for payment of amount of dowry articles in installments. J U D G E Abdul Basit
